intro: Lisianthus skinneri, also known as Lisianthus, is a flowering plant species within the mallow family, Malvaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and protecting cells from oxidative damage.
